arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the EC2 Transit Gateway.

association_default_route_table_id.description: The ID of the default route table that is used for associations in the EC2 Transit Gateway.

id.description: The unique identifier for the EC2 Transit Gateway.

owner_id.description: The AWS account ID of the owner of the EC2 Transit Gateway.

propagation_default_route_table_id.description: The ID of the default route table that is used for route propagation in the EC2 Transit Gateway.
